letter.title: [Letter] 8th Record: Item Value Protection
letter.content: We will create a market environment where the value of effort is recognized rather than indiscriminate item distribution.

letter.title: [Letter] 7th Record: 1 Week Since Official Open
letter.content: We successfully spent our first week. Please look forward to our commemorative gift this evening.

letter.title: [Letter] 6th Record: 1st Day of March
letter.content: Starting a new month, we are drawing up a massive update roadmap with an excited heart.

letter.title: [Letter] 5th Record: User Convenience First
letter.content: We are reorganizing the complex UI to be as simple and intuitive as possible.

letter.title: [Letter] 4th Record: Communication Channels Open
letter.content: We have started responding to real-time inquiries through Discord and open channels.

letter.title: [Letter] 3rd Record: Accelerated Stabilization Work
letter.content: We are devoting all our manpower to reducing the frequency of crashes and lag.

letter.title: [Letter] 2nd Record: A Warm Welcome
letter.content: We were deeply moved by the crowd immediately after the opening. We are expanding channels for smooth play.

letter.title: [Letter] 1st Record: A New Beginning
letter.content: This is Tear Studio's first step. We will write a long history together with you.

contents.title: [Content] 8th Update: Town Storage Expansion
contents.content: Town warehouse slots are basically provided to store items more generously.

contents.title: [Content] 7th Update: First Field Boss
contents.content: The giant wolf 'Fenrir' appears in the Valley of West Wind. Challenge our first raid.

contents.title: [Content] 6th Update: Chronicles of March
contents.content: This is a month-long attendance and quest event in celebration of the new month.

contents.title: [Content] 5th Update: Shared Storage System
contents.content: A shared storage space has been opened where you can send and receive items with other characters on your account.

contents.title: [Content] 4th Update: Friendship Points
contents.content: You can purchase special consumables with points earned when playing in a party with friends.

contents.title: [Content] 3rd Update: Auto-Navigation Feature
contents.content: A convenience feature has been added that automatically navigates to quest objective destinations.

contents.title: [Content] 2nd Update: Daily Quests
contents.content: Obtain essential progression materials through five types of daily missions refreshed every day.

contents.title: [Content] 1st Update: Launch Cinematic
contents.content: A grand opening video has been added for all adventurers starting the game.

fixes.title: [Patch] 8th Correction
fixes.content: Resolved an issue where the quantity input window disappeared when withdrawing items from the town warehouse.

fixes.title: [Patch] 7th Correction
fixes.content: Balanced the boss Fenrir's berserk pattern damage which was excessively powerful.

fixes.title: [Patch] 6th Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a bug where the NPC disappeared after completing event quests, preventing reward claims.

fixes.title: [Patch] 5th Correction
fixes.content: Recovered a glitch where gold abnormally evaporated when using the shared storage feature.

fixes.title: [Patch] 4th Correction
fixes.content: Resolved a synchronization bug where friendship points were paid differently among party members.

fixes.title: [Patch] 3rd Correction
fixes.content: Improved pathfinding logic where repetitive jumping on hills slowed down auto-navigation.

fixes.title: [Patch] 2nd Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a bug where the daily quest list did not refresh at 4:00 AM.

fixes.title: [Patch] 1st Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a sound bug where audio failed to play during opening videos in environments without specific codecs.
